# Chronicle — 시간해자 크로니클

> Append-only notarized ledgers of ephemeral Korean market data. Each change event is
> sealed in a SHA-256 hash chain, notarized by git commit history, and externally
> anchored via RFC 3161 timestamps — the ledger proves *when* something was observed.

Contract: one line of changes.jsonl = {observed_at, entity_id, field, before, after,
source_url, content_hash, chain_hash}. Record creation/deletion uses field=__record__.
Raw responses are preserved verbatim under snapshots/.

## Aggregate surfaces (all sources at once)

- unified feed (Atom, newest first, source-tagged): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/docs/feed.xml
- weekly digest (vanished/edited highlights): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/docs/digest.md
- machine manifest (source list + stats): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/docs/status.json

## Query instead of scrape (MCP)

chronicle-mcp is a stdio JSON-RPC 2.0 server — agents call it rather than crawling the ledger.
Tools: list_sources · get_record(source, entity_id) · get_history(source, entity_id) ·
get_changes(source, since?, until?, field?, limit?) · verify_source(source).
Run: `npx tsx mcp/server.ts` (set CHRONICLE_REPO=kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs to query the public ledger remotely).

## Sources

### agent-commerce-census — 에이전트 커머스 센서스 — x402·AP2·ACP well-known 매니페스트
- events: 96, records: 96, last observed: 2026-07-13T07:38:49.194Z
- ledger (append-only): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/data/agent-commerce-census/changes.jsonl
- current state: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/data/agent-commerce-census/latest.json
- chain state: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/data/agent-commerce-census/integrity.json
- atom feed: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/data/agent-commerce-census/feed.xml

## Verify

Recompute the whole chain from genesis: `npm run verify -- --all` in the repo.
Spec: https://github.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/blob/main/PLAN.md · Contract: https://github.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/blob/main/README.md
